display.purpose: The app title in the header. Appears once.

title.purpose: Control group labels, button text, panel titles.

body.purpose: Instructions and descriptions. Cap prose at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Small UI labels, segmented-control text, stepper names.

readout.purpose: Every numeric measurement. Monospace, tabular figures.

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: The crop-and-rotate dialog and transient popovers. Soft cool diffuse lift over a hairline border.

shadows.name: raised
shadows.purpose: The whisper of depth under the sheet preview so it reads as a physical sheet. At most once per screen.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default ease-out (quart-like) for all state transitions.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Segment thumb slide, step transitions, dropzone state.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single next action on a screen (Continue, Export PDF).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.60 0.18 254); color: oklch(0.99 0.005 254); font: 600 0.9375rem/1.35 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "SF Pro Text", system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 10px 18px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), filter 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.54 0.18 254); } .ds-btn-primary:active { filter: brightness(0.96); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.60 0.18 254); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(0.99 0.0015 254); color: oklch(0.27 0.012 254); font: 600 0.9375rem/1.35 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "SF Pro Text", system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 10px 18px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.84 0.006 254); border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.955 0.004 254); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.60 0.18 254); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary actions like Generate calibration sheet and inline toggles.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.60 0.18 254); font: 600 0.9375rem/1.35 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "SF Pro Text", system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 8px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.03 254); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.60 0.18 254); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Measurement Field
components.description: A numeric stepper for margin/offset/rotation; value in monospace with a unit suffix.
components.css: .ds-field { display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { font: 500 0.75rem/1.3 -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: oklch(0.50 0.010 254); } .ds-field-box { display: inline-flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 4px; background: oklch(0.99 0.0015 254); border: 1px solid oklch(0.84 0.006 254); border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 10px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-field-box:focus-within { border-color: oklch(0.60 0.18 254); outline: 2px solid oklch(0.60 0.18 254); outline-offset: 1px; } .ds-field-input { width: 3.5ch; border: none; outline: none; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.27 0.012 254); font: 500 0.8125rem/1.2 ui-monospace, "SF Mono", Menlo, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-field-unit { font: 500 0.8125rem/1.2 ui-monospace, "SF Mono", Menlo, monospace; color: oklch(0.50 0.010 254); }

components.name: Quadrant Segmented Control
components.description: Segmented control with a sliding Surface thumb; used for the quadrant selector and step switcher.
components.css: .ds-seg { display: inline-flex; gap: 2px; background: oklch(0.955 0.004 254); border-radius: 10px; padding: 3px; } .ds-seg-item { border: none; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.50 0.010 254); font: 500 0.75rem/1.3 -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.01em; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-seg-item:hover { color: oklch(0.27 0.012 254); } .ds-seg-item.is-active { background: oklch(0.99 0.0015 254); color: oklch(0.27 0.012 254); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.4 0.02 254 / 0.06); } .ds-seg:focus-within { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.60 0.18 254); outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 12px; }

components.name: Upload Dropzone
components.description: The drop target on the upload step; confirms drag-over with blue wash and a blue dashed border.
components.html:
Drop file or click to upload

PNG, JPG, WEBP, PDF
components.css: .ds-dropzone { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 48px 32px; background: oklch(0.99 0.0015 254); border: 1.5px dashed oklch(0.90 0.005 254); border-radius: 14px; color: oklch(0.64 0.008 254); cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-dropzone:hover { border-color: oklch(0.60 0.18 254); background: oklch(0.95 0.03 254); color: oklch(0.60 0.18 254); } .ds-dropzone-title { margin: 0; font: 600 0.9375rem/1.35 -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.27 0.012 254); } .ds-dropzone-hint { margin: 0; font: 400 0.875rem/1.5 -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.50 0.010 254); }

components.name: Wizard Stepper
components.description: Three-step linear progress: current step in Precise Blue, completed steps checked, upcoming steps faint.
components.html:
1. ✓Upload
  2. 2Crop & rotate
  3. 3Layout
components.css: .ds-stepper { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-step { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font: 500 0.75rem/1.3 -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: oklch(0.64 0.008 254); } .ds-step-dot { display: inline-grid; place-items: center; width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.955 0.004 254); color: oklch(0.50 0.010 254); font: 500 0.75rem/1 ui-monospace, "SF Mono", Menlo, monospace; } .ds-step.is-current { color: oklch(0.27 0.012 254); } .ds-step.is-current .ds-step-dot { background: oklch(0.60 0.18 254); color: oklch(0.99 0.005 254); } .ds-step.is-done { color: oklch(0.50 0.010 254); } .ds-step.is-done .ds-step-dot { background: oklch(0.95 0.03 254); color: oklch(0.60 0.18 254); }

narrative.overview: A tool you reach for, use for ninety seconds, and put down: a calm cool-gray macOS-utility window with generous air, one confident blue for the single action that matters, and nothing competing for attention. Precision is the personality. Real measurements are set in monospace with tabular figures, the sheet preview is an honest technical drawing rather than a glossy mockup, and the accent blue marks exactly one thing at a time. It rejects enterprise chrome, skeuomorphism, and generic SaaS dressing.
keyCharacteristics: Cool, blue-tinted neutrals; a single precise blue accent under 10% of any screen.
System sans for the interface, monospace with tabular figures for every measurement.
Flat by default; depth appears only for things that genuinely float (popovers, the crop dialog).
Restrained motion: state changes only, 150 to 200 ms, no choreography.
The preview reads as a drafting representation, not a product photo.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Precise Blue appears on at most 10% of any screen, and only on the single most important live element: the next action, the current step, the selected cell. If two blue things compete, one is wrong.

rules.name: The Tinted Extremes Rule
rules.body: Never #000 or #fff. Every neutral carries hue 254 at chroma 0.004 to 0.012. The grays must feel cool and intentional, not default.

rules.name: The Tabular Numbers Rule
rules.body: Any number a user reads as a measurement is set in the Readout monospace with tabular figures. Digits must never reflow or shift width while dragging a slider or stepping a field.

rules.name: The Tight Scale Rule
rules.body: Type steps stay within a 1.15 to 1.25 ratio. This is a dense product surface with many labels; exaggerated type contrast reads as noise.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Resting surfaces have no shadow. If a shadow is on something not floating or focused, delete it and add a hairline border instead.

rules.name: The Cool Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are tinted with hue 254 and kept under 0.24 opacity. A neutral-black drop shadow reads as a 2014 app; a cool, diffuse, short-offset shadow reads as current.

dos: Do keep Precise Blue on at most 10% of any screen, on the single live element that matters.
Do set every measurement in the Readout monospace with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums so digits never shift while dragging.
Do separate surfaces with hairline Borders and the canvas/surface tonal step; reserve shadow for the crop dialog and the sheet preview only.
Do tint every neutral toward hue 254 (chroma 0.004 to 0.012); use Ink, not #000, and Surface, not #fff.
Do keep motion to state changes at 150 to 200 ms with an ease-out curve; animate opacity and transform, never layout properties.
Do render the sheet preview as a precise technical drawing that matches the exported PDF one to one.
donts: Don't add enterprise chrome: dense toolbars, ribbon menus, cluttered Office-style panels, or settings sprawl.
Don't be skeuomorphic: no fake paper texture, no realistic drop-shadowed label mockups, no physical metaphors dressed up as decoration.
Don't reach for generic SaaS dressing: no gradient accents, no background-clip: text gradient headings, no hero-metric panels, no rows of identical icon-heading-text cards.
Don't use a colored border-left or border-right stripe as an accent on panels, alerts, or list items. Use a full hairline border or a Blue Wash fill.
Don't reach for a modal first. The crop-and-rotate dialog earns its floating treatment; everything else stays inline in the wizard.
Don't let a second blue, a glow, or a drop shadow compete with the One Voice.
